name: goldtrust
description: GoldTrust — savings & micro-loan platform (client, staff, front desk, ICT and admin desks in one app).

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm start --prefix server
